Sports Event: Football Championship
Date: 18 April 2026
Time: 8:30 AM onwards
Venue: College Football Ground
Maximum Teams: 10 Teams
Registration Deadline: 14 April 2026
About the Event:

The Football Championship encourages teamwork, strategy, and sportsmanship. Teams will compete in league matches followed by semi-finals and finals. Exciting prizes await the champions.
Event Rules:

• Each team must have 7 or 11 players (as per format).
• Match duration will be 30 minutes per half.
• Fair play and discipline are mandatory.
• Referee’s decision will be final.
